title: Shrug It Off
description: Adds a chance for Toughness to block weak attacks
body:
Gives Toughness more purpose. Any normal physical damage has a chance to be "shrugged off", based on the toughness of the target.

If the damage is successfully shrugged off, a "clink!" sound will play, and the attack will be completely blocked (no armor durability loss, no status effects applied by the attack.)

 

The exact formula, damage types, items affected, and entities affected are now all configurable.

 

Works with any toughness granted by other mods, including potion effects.

Recommended mods to pair this with:

Set Bonus - lets you add extra toughness as a bonus for equipping a full set of an armor type.
Rustic - adds a potion of Diamond Skin which boosts toughness greatly.
FutureMC - backports Netherite armor, which is more useful with ShrugItOff installed
Material Changer - lets you configure new toughness values for any armor item in the game
And of course, any modded armors with higher toughness than vanilla
 

Built for Minecraft 1.12.2.

It should be pretty simple to port to other versions, and it is totally open source.

 

SmokeyTheBandicoot is now co-owner.

Icon courtesy of u/DaNaDaN5 on reddit.
